instruction: Can you use the calculator app to find how many days are between Jan 3, 2024 and Aug 20 2024? Save the result in a file called 'numdays.txt' on the Desktop (e.g. X days)
Use the calculator app, how many days are there between 13/01/2023 and 20/08/2024? Can you save the answer in 'numdays.txt' on the Desktop (e.g. X days)

Calculate how many years, months, weeks and days are between 10/08/1980 (MM/DD/YYYY) and 8/2/2024 using the calculator app, and save the result in a file called 'Differences.txt' on the Desktop (e.g. X years, Y months, Z weeks, W days)
